name: sdlc-workflow
description: Complete Google Engineering Team in a Plugin: 26 agents across 9 phases (planning → incident response → retrospectives), 43 knowledge skills (core SDLC + Google practices + mattpocock integrations), 14 orchestrator commands. Full incident management, performance optimization, accessibility, observability, tech debt, release management, and organizational health.
highlights: 43 knowledge skills: 13 core SDLC, 30 Google practices (incident mgmt, perf, a11y, observability, release, tech debt, org health, etc.), 13 mattpocock integrations
6 new agents: Engineering Manager, Tech Lead, Release Manager, Technical Writer, Performance Engineer, Accessibility Engineer
5 new phases: Tech Debt Optimization, Incident Response, Retrospectives (+ 9 total)
Ready-to-use templates: RFC, design docs, ADRs, postmortems, SLOs, incident reports, performance benchmarks, accessibility audits
Code quality enforcement: linting, testing pyramid, SAST/SCA, CI/CD gates
